paper: Propagation Mechanics of an Embedded Agent

results.claim: every item has separation cost sigma(v) >= floor > 0
every report is a search terminus (>=1 committed act); no zero-act fetch
same-seed same-terminus searches have differing interiors; endpoints do not determine interior
committed record strictly increases; undo is a further step, never a return
same event registers correct-but-different resting cuts across agents; no privileged value

results.theorem: T4 Falsity is a relation (thm:falsityundefined/relation, cor:noliar)
results.claim: falsity undefined inside producer; decidable on account pairs; true/false accounts share producing state
surviving fraction = prod g_i, non-increasing; strictly decreasing when some g_i < 1
exchange cannot close while D>0; forced act targets the unmatched contrast (argmax gap)
lie/rumour/question are relations off outputs; only 'testimony' names an output; none is agent-internal

loci.rumour: multiplicative drift 1 - prod g_i over a relay chain
loci.question: gap-forced act, observer's reading -- no represented intent
